view.title: Onani Seva {id}
view.welcomeEmailConfirm: Muli ndi chitsimikiziro chokutumizira imelo yoyambirira?
view.emailSentMessage: Imelo yoyambirira yatumizidwanso. Onani inbox yanu.

reverseDns.title: Makhalidwe a DNS Woyamba
reverseDns.changeWarning: Zosintha mu DNS Woyamba zimatenga mpaka ola limodzi kusonyezeka.

ipmiLive.title: IP ya IPMI
ipmiLive.description: Pereka IP yoyenda kwa woyang'anira IPMI wotsekeredwa ku IP yanu ndipo wofunikira mpaka maola 24 okha.
ipmiLive.emailIpmiCredentials: Tumizani Zinsinsi za IPMI pa Imelo

order.title: Ika Dongosolo la Seva
order.hostnameHelp: Gwiritsani ntchito dzina la seva kuzindikiritsa seva. Domeni sikufunikira kukhala yoona kapena yolembedwa. Chochomekedwa chimodzi chikufunikira mu dzina la seva. Mwachitsanzo wina: database.local, web.server kapena your.name.
order.passwordRequirement: Dziwani: Chinsinsi chiyenera kukhala ndi maulembo osachepera 8, lingaliro limodzi lazing'ono, limodzi lalikulu, nambala imodzi, chilembo chapadera.
order.contactSales: Chonde lumikizanani ndi gulu lathu la kugulitsa.
order.autoRenewNotice: Chilolezo chidzayendetsa mwachiyambi pambuyo pa mwezi uliwonse pa {cost} mpaka chilekeredwe.
order.tosAcknowledgement: Mwa kusanya bokosi ili, mukuvomera kuti mukugula chinthu cha chilolezo chomwe chidzayendetsa mwachiyambi (malinga ndi malamulo pamwambapa) ndipo chidzalipiridwa pa khadi la krediti lomwe mupereka lero. Ngati mukufuna kuleka kuyendetsa mwachiyambi, mutha kulowa ku portalo ya kasitomala, kusankha utumiki woyenda ndikudina ulalo wa Leka kapena kutumiza imelo ku: billing{'@'}interserver.net kapena kugwiritsa ntchito njira ina yolemba mu Malamulo ndi Chikhalidwe. Mwa kusanya bokosi ndi kudina Ika Dongosolo Langa pansi, mukuvomera kuti mwawerenga, mumvetsa, ndipo muvomera Malamulo ndi Chikhalidwe athu ndi Mfundo ya Chinsinsi.
